item.title: DTCC processed first live tokenized securities trades in production, covering stocks, ETFs and US Treasurys.
SWIFT deployed a blockchain-based shared ledger with 17 global banks across six continents for 24/7 cross-border payments.
UK government launched a 54-firm tokenization taskforce with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan for live market pilots.
US and UK regulators published a 10-point roadmap to align oversight of tokenized assets, stablecoins and digital securities.
US federal regulators missed the July 18 GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules, leaving the market under interim proposals.
SEC scheduled three crypto rule proposals for July covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody and digital asset trading venues.
MiCA's EU transitional period ended July 1, barring unauthorized crypto exchanges from onboarding new clients in the bloc.
Australia's AUSTRAC Travel Rule took effect July 1, requiring identity data on all crypto transfers regardless of amount.
FATF warned that stablecoin misuse is rising while implementation of global virtual asset oversight standards remains well behind schedule.
Ostium, a real-world-asset perpetuals exchange on Arbitrum, lost $18M after an attacker submitted falsified future-dated oracle prices.
AZ-COM Maruwa, Amazon Japan's logistics partner, plans JPYC yen stablecoin payments to 2,300 truck drivers and contractors.
JCB, Japan's largest credit card network, signed an MOU with Circle to explore stablecoin payment integration at domestic retail stores.
Summer.fi halted Lazy Summer vaults after a $6M keeper exploit, adding to a string of oracle and automation attacks across DeFi.
